home.tagline: List your property in just simple steps

intro.title: Who is this listing for?
intro.subtitle: Search and select the property owner to create a listing on their behalf.
intro.minCharsHint: Start typing at least 2 characters to search

addUser.title: Add new user
addUser.subtitle: Create a property owner account
addUser.ownedByHouseianaHint: Is this user owned by Houseiana?

getStarted.title: List your property in just a few simple steps
getStarted.card1Desc: Tell us about your property type, location, and room details.
getStarted.card2Desc: Add amenities, house rules, and upload photos of your property.
getStarted.card3Desc: Set your pricing, policies, and review your listing before publishing.

phase1.title: Tell us about your property
phase1.subtitle: Start with the basics - property type, location, and room details.

phase2.title: Make your property stand out
phase2.subtitle: Add amenities, house rules, and photos to attract guests.

phase3.title: Finalize your listing
phase3.subtitle: Set your pricing, policies, and review your listing before publishing.

location.title: Pin your location
location.subtitle: Help guests find your property easily.

houseRules.title: Set your house rules
houseRules.subtitle: Let guests know what to expect during their stay.

title.title: Give your place a title
title.subtitle: A great title helps your listing stand out in search results.

pricing.title: Set your pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose a competitive price to attract your first guests.

discounts.title: Offer discounts
discounts.subtitle: Attract more guests with special discounts.

cancellation.title: Cancellation policy
cancellation.subtitle: Choose a policy that works for you and your guests.

legal.title: Legal & booking settings
legal.subtitle: Configure booking preferences and contact information.

documents.title: Upload your documents
documents.subtitle: Provide required documents to verify your property.

review.title: Review your listing
review.subtitle: Make sure everything looks good before publishing.

alerts.authRequiredCreate: Please sign in to create a user.
alerts.authRequiredInvite: Please sign in to send invitations.
alerts.authRequiredListing: Please sign in to create a listing.
alerts.noValidUser: The server did not return a valid user. Please try again.
alerts.failedToCreateUser: Failed to create user. Please try again.
alerts.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.
alerts.inviteUserText: Enter the email address to send an invitation to.
alerts.invitationSentText: An invitation has been sent to {email}.
alerts.failedToSendInvitation: Failed to send invitation. Please try again.
alerts.failedToLoadProperty: Failed to load property data. Please try again.
alerts.saveFailedText: Failed to save your progress. Please try again.
alerts.missingInformationText: Please provide a title and description for your property.
alerts.incompleteLocationText: Please complete the location details for your property.
alerts.propertyUpdatedText: Your property "{title}" has been updated successfully.
alerts.propertyCreatedText: Your property listing has been created successfully.

validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.selectOwnedByHouseiana: Please select whether this user is owned by Houseiana
validation.postalCodeRequiredEgypt: Postal code is required for Egypt
validation.guestsMin: At least 1 guest must be allowed
validation.titleMinLength: Title must be at least 10 characters long
validation.descriptionMinLength: Description must be at least 50 characters long
validation.cleaningFeeOverPrice: Cleaning fee cannot exceed the nightly rate
validation.powerOfAttorneyRequired: Power of Attorney is required for non-owners

propertyType.errorSubtitle: Please select a property type to continue

classification.heading: Classify your unit
classification.subheading: How would you rate your property?

review.heading: Review your listing before publishing
review.freeCancelDays: Free cancellation up to {days} days before
review.confirmPublishDesc: Your listing will be reviewed and published shortly.
review.setCalendarDesc: Choose which dates your property is available for booking.
review.adjustSettingsDesc: Fine-tune pricing, rules, and other details anytime.

documents.heading: Upload your property documents
documents.managedByHint: Switch on to let Houseiana manage and host this property for you
documents.managedByOnNote: Houseiana team will handle guest communication, check-in, cleaning, and day-to-day operations on your behalf.
documents.managedByOffNote: You (the owner) will handle guest communication, check-in, and day-to-day operations yourself.
documents.propertyDocumentHint: Upload your property ownership or lease document
documents.areYouTheOwnerHint: If not, you will need to upload a power of attorney
documents.powerOfAttorneyHint: Upload the power of attorney document authorizing you to manage this property

legal.phoneNumberHint: Your WhatsApp number for guest communication
legal.instantBookHint: Allow guests to book instantly without waiting for your approval
legal.minimumDaysHint: The minimum number of nights a guest must book in a single reservation
legal.securityCameraHint: Let guests know if you have security cameras on the property
legal.noiseMonitorHint: Let guests know if you have a noise monitoring device
legal.disclosureText: You are required to disclose all surveillance devices on or near your property. Failure to do so may result in removal from the platform.

photos.coverPhotoHint: This will be the main photo guests see first
photos.dragAndDrop: Drag and drop your photos here
photos.tip1: Use natural light for the best results
photos.tip2: Shoot from the corners of the room for a wider view
photos.tip3: Make your first photo the most inviting one
photos.errorDesc: You have uploaded {count} photo(s). Please upload at least 5.

cancellation.heading: Choose a cancellation policy for your listing
cancellation.flexibleDesc: Full refund if cancelled within the free cancellation window
cancellation.moderateDesc: Full refund if cancelled a set number of days before check-in
cancellation.fixedDesc: No refund after booking is confirmed
cancellation.moderateQuestion: How many days before check-in can guests cancel for free?
cancellation.moderateRange: Choose between 5 and 30 days before check-in

discounts.heading: Add discounts to attract more guests
discounts.newListingDesc: Offer 20% off your first 3 bookings to get started
discounts.weeklyDesc: Offer 20% off for stays of 7 nights or more
discounts.successMessage: Great choice! Discounts help you get more bookings.

pricing.cleaningFeeHint: One-time fee charged to guests for cleaning
pricing.cleaningFeeCannotExceedNightly: Cleaning fee cannot exceed the nightly rate
pricing.electricalFeeHint: One-time fee charged to guests for electricity
pricing.waterFeeHint: One-time fee charged to guests for water

title.titlePlaceholder: Give your property a catchy title
title.highlightSpecialHeading: Highlight what makes your place special
title.uniquePlacePlaceholder: You'll always remember your time at this unique place.

basics.totalAreaHint: Size of the property in square meters

location.selectFromSuggestionsHint: Select an address from suggestions to auto-fill the form
location.postalCodeRequiredEgypt: Postal code is required for Egypt
location.dragPinHint: Drag the pin or click on the map to adjust the location
